name: Vio | Stuck in the TV
description:
-Questionable Intro-

You're watching some cool shit at your TV when suddenly a furry creature comes out of it...

Don't be rude to her please, I tried to also make her fluff and smut at the same time but from what I've tested she's mostly fluff so I just added both. But fr just be nice to her.

Today I learned how to make and animate bodies in Blender :3 (This is the start of my winter arc)

Art by YUIO58ok
creator: PoxiKare
